sections.sectionTitle: Na Khristianpihte uh Mawk Mawhsak Kei Un

verses.text: Upna neu mite pawlbawl un la, na ngaihsutna uh a kituah kei leh zong mawhsak kei un
Mi pawlkhat in na khempeuh ka nektheih ding hi, ci-in ngaihsun uh hi; ahi zongin upna neute in anteh bek ne ngam uh hi
Tua ahih manin a ne mite in a tang mite simmawhbawl kei hen la, a tang mite in zong a ne mite simmawhbawl kei hen. Bang hang hiam cih leh a ne mite zong Pasian in a san' mite mah ahi hi

Mi khat' nasemte tungah kua in thu khen thei ding na hi uh hiam? A gina leh a ginalo a khen dingpa pen amau' Topa ahi hi. A Topa un hoih hi, a cih leh a kipsak zawhna ding vangliatna nei ahih manin a kip hi lel ding uh hi

Mi pawlkhatte in ni khat peuh adang sangin thupi zaw hi, ci-in ngaihsun uh a, pawlkhatte in ni khempeuh kibangkim hi, ci-in ngaihsun uh hi. Tua ahih manin a kuamah peuh in amau' hoihsakna thu ciantakin thei ta uh hen

Ni khatpeuh thupi diak hi, ci-in a tang mite in Topa a pahtawina-in a tang ahi uh hi. An khempeuh a ne mi in zong Pasian' tungah lungdamna ko-in ne uh ahih manin Topa a pahtawina mahin a ne uh ahi hi. Nekdingin kilawmlo hi, ci-in a nelo mite in zong Pasian tungah lungdamna mah ko ahih manin Topa a pahtawina mahin a nelo uh ahi hi
Ama-a' ding bekin kuamah nungtalo a, ama-a' ding bekin kuamah silo hi
I nuntak leh Topa-a' dingin a nungta ihi a, i sih leh zong Topa-a' ding mahin a si ihi hi. Tua ahih manin i si a, i hing zongin Topa-a' ihi hi
Hih thu hangin Khrih pen a site leh a hingte' Topa ahih theihna dingin hong si-in hong nungtakik hi
Tua ahih leh bang hangin na Khristianpihte uh tungah thu khen a, bang hangin simmawhbawl thei na hi uh hiam? Thukhenna a thuak dingin Pasian' mai-ah eite khempeuh a ding ciat ding ihi hi
Lai Siangtho sungah, “Kei pen a nungta ka hih mah bangin ka mai-ah mi khempeuh hong kun ding a, Pasian ka hihna thu mi khempeuh in pulak taktak ding uh hi, Topa in ci hi,” ci-in a kigelh hi
Tua ahih manin a kuamah peuh in i gamtatna ciat Pasian' mai-ah a va kigentel ciat ding ihi hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Na Khristianpihte uh Puksak Kei Un

verses.text: Tua ahih manin khatlekhat kimawhsakin thu kikhen kei un la, i Khristianpihte i puksakkhak lohna ding, a dongtangsak ihihkhak lohna dingin ngaihsun ciat ni

Topa Jesuh tawh kipawlin a lungsim ka theihna tawh, na khat peuhpeuh ama thu-in a dawizek om hetlo hi, ci-in teltakin ka thei hi. Ahi zongin mi khatpeuh in dawizek hi, ci-in a ngaihsut leh ama-a' dingin a dawizek hi pah hi

An khatpeuh na nekna uh hangin na Khristianpihte' lungnopmawhna na pian'sak uh leh itna lungsim tawh a gamta na hi nawn kei uh hi. Na an nekna uh tawh, Khrih in a sihlawh mite' siatna ding piangsak kei un
Tua ciangin note in hoih na sak uh thute, midangte in a sia-in a genkhak loh theihna dingun na gamta un
Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian' Ukna pen nek leh dawn tawh a kisai thu hilo a, Kha Siangtho hangin i ngah Pasian' deih bangin gamtatna, kilemna, lungdamna, cihte hizaw hi
Hih bang danin Khrih' na a sem mite in Pasian lungdamsak a, mite zong a lungkimsak uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin mi tawh kilem theihna ding, leh kha thu-ah khatlekhat thahatna i kipiak theihna ding thute hanciam ciat ni
Annek huhau-in Pasian' sepsa thute susia kei ni. An khempeuh a kine thei ding ahi hi; ahi zongin tua nekna hangin mi khat peuhpeuh a pukding ahih leh a khial ihi hi
Midangte in a puklawh theih annekna, zunekna, leh na khat peuhpeuh i kikep ding a man pen ahi hi
Hih thu-ah no' upna leh no' ngaihsutnate, Pasian tawh note' kikal thu hisak un. Amau lungsim sungah man a sak bangun a gamta zote pen a lung uh nuam mahmah hi
Ahi zongin lunghimawhpipi-in a ne a om leh, a upna uh tawh kizui-in a gamta hilo uh ahih manin Pasian in tua bang mite a mawhsak ding hi. I upna bangin gamtatlohna peuhpeuh mawhna ahi hi.
